mapper.select: SELECT * FROM relation_member WHERE relation_id = #{relationId} ORDER BY member_order
mapper.delete: DELETE rm FROM relation_member rm INNER JOIN argument_relation ar ON ar.id = rm.relation_id WHERE ar.annotation_id = #{annotationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO relation_member(relation_id, member_type, proposition_id, child_relation_id, member_role, member_order) VALUES (#{relationId}, #{memberType}, #{propositionId}, #{childRelationId}, #{memberRole}, #{memberOrder})
